atomic_facts.fact: The background is a solid purple color at the start, transitioning to a darker, textured purple with light flares.

Text appears describing a '4th attempt at making gluten-free Viennese Whirls'.
The text mentions previous attempts had issues with taste or appearance.

ocr: FOR ALL THOSE WHO'VE BEEN FOLLOWING....
You'll know this is my 4th attempt at making gluten-free
The first two attempts tasted great (but looked awful).
The third attempt looked great (but tasted awful).
And then the 4th attempt conquered everything...

atomic_facts.fact: A pink sticky note lists ingredients for a recipe.
The first two ingredients listed are 60g unsalted butter and 60g margarine.
The note lists 35g icing sugar.
The note lists 112g slr g/f flour.
The note lists 30g cornflour.
The final ingredient listed is 1/4 tspn vanilla.

atomic_facts.fact: The background is a solid, uniform purple color.
The text is white and lists specific measurements for baking ingredients.
The list includes unsalted butter, margarine, icing sugar, self-raising gluten-free flour, cornflour, and vanilla extract.

spatial: The text block is left-aligned and positioned vertically centered on the left side of the screen, with significant empty purple space to the right.
state_changes: Scene transitions from woman in kitchen to static text list of ingredients

visible_entities.desc: Purple background with white text

atomic_facts.fact: The screen displays a recipe method with 6 numbered steps.
The text is white on a solid purple background.
The heading 'METHOD' is visible at the top left.
Step 1 instructs to cream butter, marge, vanilla & sugar together.
Step 4 specifies baking for 15 mins in a 190 Celsius oven.

ocr: 1. Cream butter, marge, vanilla & sugar together.
2. Add flours and mix in well.
3. Pipe 2 inch circles onto baking parchment.
4. Bake for 15 mins in a 190 Celsius oven.
spatial: The text is left-aligned and centered vertically on a solid purple background.
state_changes: Text content changes from ingredient list to recipe method steps
